message: POST /webhook with no Content-Type header (and no body) leaves req.body as body-parser's placeholder {} (express.raw's shouldParse gate never matches when there is no Content-Type to test against '*/*'). crypto.createHmac(...).update({}) then throws TypeError [ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE] uncaught inside the route handler, which Express converts to HTTP 500 with a raw Node stack trace (absolute file paths, dependency internals) in the response body -- not any of the spec's defined responses (200/400/401/409), and leaks implementation details to an unauthenticated caller.
criterion_ref: Add POST /webhook ... verifies an X-Signature header ... Mismatch (or malformed/missing header) responds 401
